auth.forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.

errors.emailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email before signing in. Check your inbox.
errors.pendingApproval: Your account is pending approval by an administrator.
errors.rateLimitExceeded: Too many attempts. Try again in 15 minutes.
errors.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters

common.noConnectionMessage: You're viewing saved data. Reconnect to update.

errors.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

wizard.notesPlaceholder: E.g.: measured on an empty stomach...
wizard.noDataMessage: Enter at least one measurement to save.

weight_kg.label: Weight
weight_kg.tip: Stand on the scale without shoes, ideally on an empty stomach

height_cm.label: Height
height_cm.tip: Stand straight against the wall, without shoes

body_fat_pct.label: Body fat %
body_fat_pct.tip: Enter from your smart scale or body fat measuring device

neck_cm.label: Neck
neck_cm.tip: Measure just below the larynx (Adam's apple), horizontal tape

shoulder_cm.label: Shoulders
shoulder_cm.tip: Measure the widest point from shoulder to shoulder, arms relaxed

chest_cm.label: Chest
chest_cm.tip: Measure at armpit level, exhaling gently

waist_cm.label: Waist
waist_cm.tip: Measure the narrowest part of the torso, between ribs and hips

abdomen_cm.label: Abdomen
abdomen_cm.tip: Measure at navel level, without holding your stomach in

hip_cm.label: Hips
hip_cm.tip: Measure the widest point of your hips and glutes

arm_cm.label: Arm (bicep)
arm_cm.tip: Flexed bicep, midpoint between shoulder and elbow

thigh_cm.label: Thigh
thigh_cm.tip: Midpoint of the thigh, standing with weight evenly distributed

calf_cm.label: Calf
calf_cm.tip: At the widest point of the calf, standing
